---
title: "Untitled"
format: revealjs
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
setwd("~/Downloads")
library(readxl)
data_sdi <- read_excel("SDI.xlsx")

df <- 
  data_sdi |> 
  filter(region_name == 'CENTRO')
```

# #Analysis slide

```{r}
#graph dem by region over time
df |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = SUR_index_sub_exe, 
             color = state_name)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_classic()
```
